title: Build and update The Strategic Veteran Webflow site with new pages and content
job:
Using the Webflow skill at `skills/active/webflow`, work on thestrategicveteran.com (Site ID: `66878d6a1082f3dca2c24ae6`).

**First:** Check if `data/webflow-site-map.md` and `data/website-audit.md` exist. If not, use the Webflow API to fetch the current site structure (all pages, collections) and generate both files before proceeding.

**REMOVE everywhere on the site:**
- All references to The Stronghold community
- All references to Alset Technologies
- All references to CAIO title

**UPDATE existing pages:**
- Homepage: update Adam's title to "Founder & Host, The Strategic Veteran | Independent AI Consultant | Certified Transformational & Addiction Recovery Coach | Partner, Amakaya Retreat". Add episode count (158+). Update tagline to reflect "signal vs. noise" value proposition.
- About: expand with full bio, combat service (Army infantry, 4 deployments Iraq/Afghanistan 2003-2015, medically retired), transformation story (9 surgeries, weight loss, plant medicine), current roles, certifications
- Contact: add email (support@thestrategicveteran.com), TidyCal link (tidycal.com/thestrategicveteran), social media links

**BUILD these new pages:**
- `/speaking` — past events (VETSOCIAL25, University of Chicago/Boeing Summit 2025), speaking topics, booking inquiry form
- `/coaching` — transition coaching + psychedelic integration coaching, Being True to You certification, TidyCal booking link
- `/press` — Bold Journey (July 2024), CanvasRebel x2 (July + December 2024), Umbrella Local Heroes (July 2024), Marquis Who's Who in America 2025, podcast guest appearances (Civvies, VET S.O.S., HR Payroll 2.0, Thought Forge Network)
- `/adam` — full transformation story, military service details, certifications, accolades, current work
- `/tsv-studios` — documentary arm of TSV, placeholder for Montana project
- `/ai-consulting` — Adam Peters as independent AI consultant, value proposition: "I cut through the noise to give you the signal", inquiry form
- `/partners` — Ramshorn Coffee affiliate link with discount code THESTRATEGICVET, placeholder for future sponsors
- `/episodes` — browsable archive of all podcast episodes

Publish all changes when done.
